data.body:
## Acceptance Criteria

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh passes (all GREEN)
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/tests/scripts/test-merge-to-main-version-bump.sh
- [ ] _phase_version_bump function exists in merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: grep -q "_phase_version_bump()" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] _ALL_PHASES contains version_bump between merge and validate
  Verify: grep "_ALL_PHASES" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | grep -q "merge.*version_bump.*validate"
- [ ] --bump flag is parsed in the script
  Verify: grep -q "CLI_BUMP_TYPE\|BUMP_TYPE" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh
- [ ] --help output includes bump flag documentation
  Verify: bash $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh --help 2>&1 | grep -q "bump"
- [ ] Syntax check passes on merge-to-main.sh
  Verify: python3 -c "import subprocess; r=subprocess.run(['bash','-c','bash -n $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh 2>&1'],capture_output=True); exit(r.returncode)"
- [ ] Version bump uses amend to fold into merge commit
  Verify: grep -A 20 "_phase_version_bump()" $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/merge-to-main.sh | grep -q "amend"
